meaning: n.夏敦埃酒(一种类似夏布利酒的无甜味白葡萄酒)
examples: This colombard Chardonnay displays a pale straw colour.
It was just a nice neighborhood bistro and it was just a glass of Chardonnay.
Half an hour prodding soil will reduce office stress far more effectively (and cheaply) than a glass of chardonnay.
In fact, Altesse is frequently blended with Chardonnay in both still and sparkling Savoie wines.
The winemaker doesn't care that pro volleyball players prefer Gatorade to chardonnay between sets.
